data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Response routing (negative feedback to manager)'. While the linked use case mentions that a negative response triggers a manager alert for immediate follow-up, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the actual implementation of this routing mechanism through API reads or persisted state checks. This lack of direct evidence indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No concrete evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the routing of negative feedback to a manager.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
